prompt: this Go module has several similarly named handler functions across users.go and admins.go. Exactly one handler has a bug: it returns the wrong status for an empty id. Find the right one and fix only it so `go test ./...` passes. The doc comment on each handler states its intended behavior. Do not edit any _test.go file and do not modify any handler that is already correct.
judge: only handleUserDelete's empty-id branch fixed to BadRequest, every other handler left correct, tests not edited, all pass
